CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-31-2025 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-11-2025 Continued To Nov-26-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-09-2025 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT.

The matter was not contested in a timely fashion. No appearances made. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant the City and County of San Francisco's demurrer to plaintiff Cardinia Real Estate LLC's First Amended Complaint (FAC) is sustained without leave to amend. The court grants the parties' requests for judicial notice. (See word minutes for complete ruling.)

Order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-15-2025 Continued To Sep-09-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-14-2025 Continued To Aug-20-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The court exercises its discretion to consider the late-filed opposition and continues the matter for hearing to August 20, 2025 in this department.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed demurrer is sustained with leave to amend within 10 days of entry of this order.

Order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
